title: Modern Mixins
description: Modern mixin & mixinextras loader for abandoned modloaders
body:
# ModernMixins
ModernMixins is a modern mixin & mixinextras loader for abandoned modloaders
# Overview
- Mixin version: 0.8.6
- MixinExtras version: 0.3.6

- Supported loaders: \
[x] Rift 1.13.2 \
[x] Forge 1.13.2 \
[ ] LiteLoader 1.12.2
